## Problem

<!-- What user-facing problem does this solve? Who hits it? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- Sketch the change. UI? API? Data model? Be specific. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What else did you think about? Why is the proposed solution better? -->

## Scope

- [ ] Small (a few files)
- [ ] Medium (one subsystem)
- [ ] Large (cross-cutting, needs design)

## Willing to implement?

- [ ] Yes, I'll open the PR
- [ ] Maybe, with guidance
- [ ] No, just proposing
